name: image-search-mcp
label: Image Search
description: Search the web for images (Unsplash, Pexels, Google), reverse-image search via Google Lens, and save images to the agent's workspace

fields.label: Unsplash Access Key (free)
fields.help: Free signup at https://unsplash.com/developers (50 req/hr dev tier, 5000/hr after auto-promotion).

fields.label: SerpAPI Key (paid, optional — unlocks Google Images AND Lens reverse search)
fields.help: ONE key serves both: full-web Google Images for find_images (prefer_provider='google'/'all') AND Google Lens for search_by_image. Google's own Custom Search API can no longer enable whole-web search for new engines (deprecated by Google late 2024 / early 2025), so we route through SerpAPI's google_images engine instead. Sign up at https://serpapi.com/manage-api-key — 100 free searches/month, then ~$0.01 per search ($50/mo for 5000 on the Developer plan).

agent_context.template:
## Image search & display

You can search the web for images and show them to the user inline. When the user asks about a place, object, person, event, or anything visual, default to showing images, not just describing.

**Forward search** — `find_images(query, count=3)` returns image URL candidates. Pick the best 1-4, then call `display_images(images=[...])` from display-mcp to render them in chat.

**Reverse search** — when the user uploads a photo and asks what it is, where to buy it, where it appears online, etc., call `search_by_image(image_path, mode="products" | "visual_matches" | "exact_matches" | "all")`. Then show the matches via `display_images(images=[...])` with `link_url` set to each product/source URL so the user can click through to the retailer page.

**Save** — only call `save_image(url, dest_path)` when the user explicitly asks to save an image.

**Provider preference** (`find_images`) — default `prefer_provider="all"` uses every configured provider. Use `"stock"` (free Unsplash + Pexels only) for scenic / object / lifestyle queries to save the user money. Use `"google"` (real Google Image Search results via SerpAPI, ~$0.01/call) when you need real-world specifics (people, news, specific products, brands).

**Communication style** — feel free to use emojis sparingly when they help scan-readability (✅ done, ⚠️ warning, 🔧 fix, 💡 idea). Don't over-do it.

skills.description: How and when to call find_images, search_by_image, and save_image
